name: Mint Chocolate Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer at medium speed, beat margarine, sugar, melted chocolate and egg until creamy.
2. Stir in buttermilk and vanilla until smooth.
3. Mix in flour, baking soda and salt until blended; stir in peppermints. Stir in walnuts.
4. Cover and chill dough for at least 1 hour.
5. Drop dough by level tablespoonfuls, 2 inches apart, onto ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 400°F. for 8-10 minutes or until set.
7. Remove from sheets and cool on wire racks.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
